title: hieracium wilczekianum subsp. neveanum
intro: Hieracium wilczekianum subsp. neveanum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family with yellow flowers. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium wilczekianum subsp. neveanum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Hieracium wilczekianum subsp. neveanum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
